task: Review cross-branch utilization dashboards to spot branches or asset classes that are chronically under- or over-utilized.
tool_today: BI dashboards, utilization reports, telematics views
decision_content: Decide whether the outlier needs transfer action, coaching, rate changes, or deliberate hold because of local market context.

task: Assemble the monthly operating pack for leadership or board review from branch P&L, utilization, uptime, and exception data.
tool_today: Rental reports, Excel, BI exports, presentation deck
decision_content: Choose what narrative and exceptions matter for leadership review after the pack is assembled.

task: Approve or redirect buy-vs-transfer-vs-re-rent recommendations for demand gaps across the branch network.
frequency: as fleet reviews and shortage cases reach executive level
tool_today: Capex model, utilization data, demand forecast, finance input
decision_content: Commit capital, authorise redeployment, or accept re-rent cost based on demand quality and internal supply.

task: Monitor branch KPI gaps against market or internal benchmarks and push corrective actions to regional and branch leaders.
tool_today: Benchmark reports, BI dashboards, branch review notes
decision_content: Judge whether a gap is pricing, utilization, staffing, or process-driven and who should own the fix.

task: Lead new-branch expansion or integration planning across operations, systems, staffing, and customer support.
frequency: as acquisitions or branch launches occur
tool_today: Project plans, org charts, systems rollout checklists
decision_content: Sequence staffing, systems, and operating-standard rollout so the new branch can ramp without destabilizing existing branches.

task: Set regional operating priorities and standards across rental, service, logistics, and yard functions.
frequency: quarterly business review and reset cycle
tool_today: KPI dashboards, policy docs, regional meetings
decision_content: Choose which operating standard changes are material enough to mandate and how aggressively to push them through local managers.

task: Review telematics or AI-generated fleet intelligence that surfaces utilization, uptime, or anomaly actions faster than analyst-built reports.
frequency: weekly executive and regional operating rhythm
tool_today: Telematics AI platform, BI dashboards, utilization alert queue
decision_content: Decide which surfaced recommendations warrant follow-up versus which are noise or belong lower in the organization.
